prompt: Implement the intrusive doubly linked list API in utility.c. list_init uses a circular sentinel. Support append, prepend, remove, pop_front, and pop_back. Removal must leave the removed node self-linked; popping an empty list returns NULL. Do not allocate memory.
instruction: Implement the intrusive doubly linked list API in utility.c. list_init uses a circular sentinel. Support append, prepend, remove, pop_front, and pop_back. Removal must leave the removed node self-linked; popping an empty list returns NULL. Do not allocate memory.
